questionHtml: Calculate an estimate of the mean height of the 200 students.
markschemeHtml:
attempt to substitute values in the mean formula with at least one mid-interval value multiplied by a corresponding frequency                    (M1)

(mean =) 176 176.3 cm                    A1

[2 marks]

meta.title: Calculate an estimate of the mean height of the 200 students.
